market.summary: Global markets are rallying on optimism surrounding US-Iran peace de-escalation; oil prices are easing.

art.summary: US art market is showing recovery with a 23% increase in auction sales in 2025. Restructuring focuses on established names.
art.featured_event: Artnet 'Important Photographs' sale of Vivian Maier works closes today.

corporate.alert: RenX (NASDAQ: RENX) 1-for-20 reverse stock split effective today.
